description.primary:
Take control of your subscriptions with SubTally — the privacy-first subscription tracker that keeps your financial data on your device.

Never lose track of a recurring payment again. SubTally helps you monitor all your subscriptions, see upcoming charges at a glance, and cancel unwanted services with step-by-step guides.

KEY FEATURES:

• Track All Subscriptions — Add and manage unlimited subscriptions with custom billing cycles (weekly, monthly, yearly, and more)

• Payment Calendar — See all upcoming charges in a beautiful calendar view so you're never caught off guard

• Smart Analytics — Visualize your spending by category with interactive charts. Know exactly where your money goes

• Cancel Guides — Step-by-step cancellation instructions for 30+ popular services including Netflix, Spotify, Amazon, and more

• Payment Reminders — Get notified before each billing date so you can decide whether to keep or cancel

• Calendar Sync — Add subscription events directly to your iPhone calendar

• CSV Export — Export your subscription data for use in spreadsheets

• Biometric Lock — Protect your data with Face ID or Touch ID

• Privacy First — All data stays on your device. We never collect, transmit, or access your subscription information

FREE VERSION:
• Track up to 5 subscriptions
• Basic analytics and reminders
• Cancel guides for all services

UPGRADE TO PRO:
• Unlimited subscription tracking
• Calendar sync
• Advanced analytics
• CSV export
• All future features

One-time purchase. No recurring fees. Ever.

SubTally is perfect for anyone who wants to:
- Stop paying for forgotten subscriptions
- See their total monthly and yearly subscription costs
- Get reminders before charges hit
- Cancel services they no longer use

Download SubTally today and start saving money on subscriptions you forgot about!
